\tzpentry{ID3342}{Quantum Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3342 introduces Quantum Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} F_{ \text{quantum}}( \rho, \sigma) = \left( \text{Tr} \sqrt{ \sqrt{ \rho} \sigma \sqrt{ \rho}} \right)^2 \end{equation}
